# hetzner_servers (Data Source)

Lists all Hetzner dedicated servers.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_servers" "all" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `servers` (Attributes List) List of servers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers))

<a id="nestedatt--servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers`

Read-Only:

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the server has been cancelled.
- `dc` (String) The data center.
- `paid_until` (String) Date the server is paid until.
- `product` (String) The product name.
- `server_ip` (String) The main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) The main IPv6 network.
- `server_name` (String) The user-assigned server name.
- `server_number` (Number) The unique server number.
- `status` (String) Server status.
- `traffic` (String) Free traffic quota.
